nodes.name: Friday 2PM ET
nodes.notes: Trigger: Friday 2:00 PM ET. Set n8n timezone to America/New_York.

nodes.name: Taostats 7d History
nodes.notes: SN106 pool history for the past 7 days.

nodes.name: CoinGecko TAO 7d
nodes.notes: TAO price chart data for the past 7 days.

nodes.name: CoinGecko SN106 7d
nodes.notes: SN106 alpha token price chart for the past 7 days.

nodes.name: Bridge Volume 7d
nodes.notes: Weekly bridge volume from Tracker/FastAPI. May not be available yet.

nodes.name: GitHub Repos
nodes.notes: Fetch repo list to count active repos in last 7 days.

nodes.name: Merge All Data
nodes.notes: Merge all 7-day data sources into a single object for Claude.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-20250514",
  "max_tokens": 2000,
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "You are writing a weekly recap X thread for @v0idai (VoidAI, Bittensor SN106 subnet). Write 8-10 tweets as a thread.

Rules:
- First tweet is the hook. Must stop the scroll.
- Each tweet must be under 280 characters.
- Use specific numbers. No fluff.
- Tone: builder-credible, data-first, direct. Not hype.
- Include $TAO and #Bittensor hashtags naturally.
- Last tweet: forward-looking CTA (follow, bridge, join Discord).
- NEVER use: guaranteed returns, risk-free, passive income, to the moon, or any price predictions.
- NEVER use em dashes. Use commas, periods, or colons.
- Include a short disclaimer in the last tweet: 'Not financial advice. DYOR.'
- Do NOT use any of these phrases: 'It's worth noting', 'In the ever-evolving landscape', 'game-changer', 'paradigm shift', 'seamless integration', 'robust ecosystem', 'cutting-edge'.

Week ending: {{ $json.week_ending }}

Data:
- TAO price: ${{ $json.tao_current_price }} ({{ $json.tao_weekly_change_pct }}% weekly)
- SN106 Alpha price: ${{ $json.alpha_current_price }} ({{ $json.alpha_weekly_change_pct }}% weekly)
- Bridge volume: {{ $json.bridge_total_tao }} TAO bridged this week
- Bridge transactions: {{ $json.bridge_tx_count }}
- Unique bridge wallets: {{ $json.bridge_unique_wallets }}
- GitHub repos active: {{ $json.github_active_repos }}

Format your response as a JSON array of strings, one per tweet. Example:
["1/ Hook tweet here", "2/ Second tweet", ..., "8/ Final tweet with CTA"]"
    }
  ]
}

nodes.name: Claude: Generate Thread
nodes.notes: Generate 8-10 tweet thread from weekly data. Uses claude-sonnet-4-20250514 for cost efficiency.

nodes.name: Parse Thread
nodes.notes: Parse Claude response into individual tweets. Validate each is under 280 chars.

nodes.name: Write to Drafts Queue
nodes.notes: Write thread to queue/drafts/ with YAML frontmatter. ALWAYS requires human review.

nodes.name: Discord: Review Needed
nodes.notes: Notify Vew that the weekly recap is ready for human review.
